purpose: Prepare per-system digital twin landing documents with explicit display limits, source authority, and claim gates before any public or route-level exposure.

systems.title: SHFF digital twin landing doc
systems.claimGate: no validation implication without reviewed evidence

systems.title: Mark Luke landing doc
systems.claimGate: private/person-related details require owner review before display

systems.title: RFS / EMFF historical technical stream landing doc
systems.claimGate: must not merge into EML#F external scope

systems.title: InterSol landing doc
systems.claimGate: national dossier wording review before publication

systems.title: M1 concept panel landing doc
systems.claimGate: simulation-only until empirical support is separately recorded

blockedDisplay: unsupported validation or empirical proof claims
wallet token custody or payment actions
nextActions: Create one markdown landing doc per system from this config.
Attach source references only after each source file is inspected.
Keep all unresolved display questions in OPEN_TASKS until owner review.
